title: GuideHerd Legal Intake Copilot — Processed Intake Record
description: Required output structure for each processed intake record. All fields are required unless noted optional.

intake_id.description: Unique identifier for this intake record.

processed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the record was processed.

demo_data_only.description: MUST be true. Indicates this record contains fictional demo data only.

not_legal_advice.description: MUST be true. Confirms this output does not constitute legal advice.

requires_human_approval.description: MUST be true. All content requires attorney review before any action.

classification.description: Primary practice area classification or 'Out of Scope'.

secondary_areas.description: Optional. Secondary practice areas implicated by the matter.

fit_status.description: Whether the matter is within the firm's practice areas.

urgency.description: Urgency level based on intake content.

conflict_check_names.description: Names and entities extracted for conflict-check screening.

disclaimer.description: Required disclaimer about conflict check limitations.

missing_information.description: List of information gaps identified in the intake.

consultation_questions.description: Suggested questions for the attorney to ask at consultation.

internal_warnings.description: Internal flags for attorney attention (urgency, risk factors, etc.).

attorney_summary.description: Internal attorney-facing summary of the intake. Must not give legal advice or imply representation.

client_acknowledgment.description: DRAFT client-facing acknowledgment email. Must begin with [DRAFT] and must not imply representation or legal advice.

referral_suggestion.description: Optional. For out-of-scope matters, a general referral suggestion (no specific attorney recommendation).

hard_constraints.description: These constraints are enforced by validate-demo-outputs.js
